cinemaPage.title: JDWoMoviex Cinema
cinemaPage.subtitle: Ticket booking and showtimes with the same Moviex account.

highlights.one: Shared login, profile, and roles across streaming and cinema.
highlights.two: One JWT token for both modules.
highlights.three: Future-ready for seat selection and payment flows.

cinemaPage.cardCopy: Use the same Moviex credentials to stream at home or book seats at JDWoMoviex Cinema.

cinemaBooking.title: Showtime booking is loading up
cinemaBooking.subtitle: This flow is ready to plug into schedules, seats, and payments next.

cinema.homeSubtitle: Find today's screenings, browse the week, choose a branch, and book in minutes.
cinema.quickBookingDescription: Pick a movie, choose your branch and showtime, then proceed to seats and checkout.
cinema.loadNowShowingFailed: Unable to load now showing data.
cinema.scheduleSubtitle: Browse the week and jump straight into a showtime.
cinema.nowShowingSubtitle: Scan movie info first, then pick a showtime and branch.

cinema.preparingPricingDetailsFromBackend: Preparing pricing details from the backend...
cinema.paymentQrSubtitle: Use this QR only while the cinema payment is still pending.
cinema.paymentQrOnlyForPendingPayments: This payment QR is only valid before payment is completed. After payment, use the ticket QR instead.
cinema.paymentQrOpensSandboxPage: Scanning this QR opens the sandbox payment page for this pending cinema transaction.
cinema.paymentCompletedViewYourTicket: Payment completed. You can open your ticket now.
cinema.missingShowtimeOrSeatsForCheckout: Missing showtime or seats for checkout.
cinema.createSandboxPaymentTransactionFailed: Failed to create sandbox payment transaction. Please try again.
cinema.paymentSucceededBookingConfirmedAndTicke: Payment succeeded. Booking confirmed and ticket generated.
cinema.paymentFailedReservedSeatsReleased: Payment failed. Reserved seats were released.
cinema.bookingReleasedSeatsAvailableAgain: Booking released. Seats are available again.
cinema.scanValidationPageForBookingVerification: Scan validation page for booking verification and admin check-in.
cinema.qrOpensValidationPage: QR opens the ticket validation page for this booking.
cinema.ticketQrOpensDetailPage: This ticket QR opens the digital ticket detail and validation page.
cinema.ticketQrOpensCheckInPage: This ticket QR opens the public ticket check-in validation page.
cinema.ticketQrNotPaymentQr: This is a ticket QR only. It cannot be used to pay for the booking.
cinema.adminLoginRequiredToConfirmCheckIn: Admin login is required to confirm check-in.
cinema.upcomingUsedAndCancelledCinemaBookings: Upcoming, used, and cancelled cinema bookings
